# feat: C2 regression refactor + C3/C4/C5 critical fixes

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `2d69f36bf17f` — feat: C2 regression refactor + C3/C4/C5 critical fixes

**Body**:

C2: feasibility_regression.py — GradientBoostingRegressor predicting months_to_achieve_goal.
Post-processing classifies residual into Green/Yellow/Red (0.85/1.15 boundaries).
CV RMSE 6755 months, feature importance spread across all 7 features (not dominated
by investment_to_income_ratio like the contaminated classifier).

C3: 15% contingency buffer on property goals (PROPERTY_BUFFER=1.15).
Covers PPHTB, notary, and price appreciation — was silently omitted.

C4: Equity cap 40% / REITs cap 10% for timelines < 3 years.
Short-horizon goals cannot absorb equity drawdown risk.
Also fixed pre-existing bug: compute_blended_return returned pct not decimal rate,
causing projected values to inflate to 10^27.

C5: IDR depreciation buffer on abroad education costs.
IDR weakens ~4%/yr + 10% buffer for application fees/exchange slippage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
